title: Project Overview
description: Start with the repository README to understand the platform goals, runtime architecture, and major subsystems.

title: Backend Runtime Startup
description: Follow the FastAPI entrypoint and worker startup files to see how API and async processing processes are assembled.

title: Core Backend Foundations
description: Inspect configuration, database sessions, security, logging, events, and observability foundations used across modules.

title: Backend Domain Modules
description: Explore feature modules where missions, telemetry, warehouse mapping, integrations, video analysis, and geospatial workflows are implemented.

title: Infrastructure Adapters
description: Review adapters that connect domain workflows to camera runtime, MAVLink, messaging, mapping, photogrammetry, and storage systems.

title: Frontend Application Shell
description: Move to the React bootstrap, providers, routing, and app shell that frame the operator dashboard.

title: Frontend Feature Workflows
description: Inspect dashboard feature modules that present missions, telemetry, mapping, warehouse, alerts, fleet, and observability workflows.

title: Operations, Tests, And Simulation
description: Finish with Docker Compose, test suites, docs, and the optional ROS 2 bridge to understand how the system runs outside application code.
